title: cajanus niveus
intro: Cajanus niveus, also known as white bean or silver cluster bean, is a plant species that belongs to the family Fabaceae and is native to tropical Asia. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cajanus niveus include reducing blood sugar levels, lowering cholesterol, and exhibiting potential anti-cancer properties. The plant can be prepared as herbal tea, infusions, or decoctions, and is also used in Ayurvedic medicine to treat various health conditions.
